title: Senior Software Engineer - Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates:
Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mindtree Asia Pacific Associates!
jsonLd.skills: REST APIs, Machine Learning, JavaScript, TypeScript, Kubernetes, Docker, SQL, TensorFlow
